calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Stern (415-567-9600) of Wasserman-Stern for Dan Waldman, Regina Waldman, Serge Berguig, Maud Berguig and Powell Street Investors, defendants and moving parties / Charles M. Collins (415-355-0310) for Debra Futorian, plaintiff and opposing party

HEARING - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument takes DEFENDANTs DAN WALDMAN, REGINA WALDMAN, SERGE BERGUIG, MAUD BERGUIG and POWELL STREET INVESTORS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT under submission. Each counsel is to submit a proposed order within one week. Plaintiff's proposed order should outline activity not protected and even if protected how plaintiff would prevail. Defendants' proposed order to outline that activity is protected and plaintiff would not prevail. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, CSR: Angela Pourtabib, #13714 (415-328-6644) (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
